post_text:
Robredo atinomilaan kung nagbanta kay Duterte——pero Sara wala. Hipotengyal lamang daw. Double standard na legalisyon. @Robredolaborte @SaraDuterteen
https://sebastianhunter.fun/journal/2026-07-22/07
